text:
Title: About noon

About noon
noon is an easy and secure platform for people to discover and shop the products they love. With fast delivery,
easy payment and return options and 24-hour customer service, find everything you need at competitive prices.
All our products are backed by our authenticity promise and noon warranty.

Title: Delivery Review Guidelines

Delivery Review Guidelines
Delivery Reviews are your way to rate and share feedback about your delivery experience on noon. This includes aspects like delivery
timing, packaging condition, handling of the order, and the behavior of the delivery partner.

Title: Delivery Review Guidelines

Who Can Submit a Delivery Review?
Any noon customer with at least one delivered order can participate.

Title: Delivery Review Guidelines

What to Include in Your Review
When writing a review, please base it on your direct delivery experience, such as:
Whether the delivery was on time.
Whether the packaging was intact and the items arrived in good condition.
The professionalism and courtesy of the delivery partner.
Any handling issues you noticed during delivery.

Title: Delivery Review Guidelines

What Is Not Allowed
Your review must follow the broader noon Community Guidelines. The following content is not allowed:
Unsupported or unintelligible languages.
Repetitive text, spam, ASCII art, or symbols.
Private or personally identifiable information (email addresses, phone numbers, home addresses, license plates, order numbers).
Profanity, harassment, threats, hate speech, or content promoting illegal or unsafe activity.
External links, promotional content about competitors, or content influenced by compensation or conflict of interest.

Title: Delivery Review Guidelines

When Not to Use Delivery Reviews
Do not use this type of review for topics unrelated to delivery experience. For the appropriate category, use:
Seller Review Guidelines for seller behavior.
Product Reviews for product quality.
Returns & Refunds help for payment/return issues.

Title: Delivery Review Guidelines

Enforcement & Consequences
Reviews that violate these rules may be removed or hidden. Repeated or substantial violations may result in restricted access to
community features or account suspension.

Title: Delivery Review Guidelines

Reporting a Problematic Review
If you identify a delivery review that you believe violates the rules:
1. Click the “Report” button next to the review.
2. Follow the submission process outlined in the How to Report a Review article.
For more details, refer to noon’s Customer Reviews Anti-Manipulation Policy to understand how reviews are monitored and managed.

Title: noon Credits and Gift Vouchers

noon Credits and Gift Vouchers
Gift vouchers allow you to add a fixed value to your noon Credits balance, which you can use to pay for orders
across the platform. You can redeem a voucher directly from the email you received or by entering the code
manually in your account.
Redeeming Gift Voucher From Email
Create a noon account or log in to your existing account.
Open the voucher email and select Redeem Now.
You will be taken to the credits redemption page, and the voucher amount will be added to your noon Credits
balance.
Redeeming Gift Voucher Manually
Log in to your noon account.
Go to Account > noon Credits.
Enter your 16-digit gift card number and 4-digit PIN or voucher code, then click Redeem to add the amount to
your balance.

Title: How can I create a noon account?

How can I create a noon account?
A noon account allows you to place orders, track shipments, manage returns, and access exclusive features such as
noon Credits. Creating an account is quick.
- Open the noon website or app and navigate to the Sign Up page.
- Enter your email ID, and an OTP will be sent to that email ID
- Enter the OTP and click "Log in" to complete registration.
Your account will be created instantly, and you can start shopping right away.

Title: Unsubscribing From noon Newsletters

Unsubscribing From noon Newsletters
You can stop receiving promotional emails from noon at any time. The unsubscribe option is available in every
marketing email.
- Use the email account where you receive noon communications.
- Look for the Unsubscribe link located in the footer.
- Your preferences will be updated instantly.
- Click the link and follow the prompt to unsubscribe.
- Your preferences will be updated instantly.

Title: How to Check Your Order Status

How to Check Your Order Status
After placing an order, you can track every stage of its progress through your noon account. Updates are shared in
real time, and each item in your order has its own status.
Steps to check the order status:
- Sign in to your noon account on the app or website.
- Select the Orders tab from your account menu.
- You will see a list of all your recent orders, and each item will display its current status, such as:
- Confirmed
- Packed
- Dispatched
- Out for delivery
- Delivered
- Select any item within the order to see detailed tracking information, including shipping updates and the latest
movement of that item.

Title: Becoming a Seller of noon

Becoming a Seller of noon
Join the growing noon seller community by registering your store on noon seller website.

Title: noon Community Guidelines

noon Community Guidelines
The noon community allows customers to share feedback or experiences about products, sellers, and delivery on the
Platform. Using these community features means you agree to these guidelines and noon’s Terms of Use.
“Community Features” include:
Seller Reviews
Product Reviews
Delivery Reviews

Title: noon Community Guidelines

Who can participate?
Any customer with a noon account who has at least one successfully delivered order.

Title: noon Community Guidelines

Content Standards- What is Allowed
Honest feedback and experiences about products, sellers, or delivery.
Posts in supported languages (currently English or Arabic).

Title: noon Community Guidelines

What is NOT Allowed
Unsupported Language or Gibberish
Non-English/Arabic content
Nonsense text, repeated characters, ASCII art, or text consisting solely of symbols/emojis.
Spam, Self-Promotion, or External Links:
Repetitive text or images made with symbols
Advertising, promotions for competitors, hyperlinks to external sites
Personal or Private Information: Emails, phone numbers, home addresses, license plates, order numbers, etc.
Profanity, Harassment, or Threats: Name-calling, direct attacks, defamation, or inflammatory content.
Hate Speech: Content targeting individuals based on race, ethnicity, nationality, gender, sexual orientation, religion, age,
disability, etc.
Sexual or Explicit Content: Though feedback on age-restricted or intimate items is allowed, explicit descriptions or
profanity aren’t.
Illegal or Harmful Behavior: Promotions or instructions for violence, fraud, underage use, child/animal abuse, product
misuse, etc.
Conflicts of Interest or Paid Reviews: Reviews created or edited by you for your own products/services, or in exchange
for compensation. (Also covers friends, relatives, business associates, competitors.)
Plagiarism & Intellectual Property: Only post original content or content you have the right to. No impersonation, no
copyright/trademark infringement.

Title: noon Community Guidelines

Enforcement & Consequences
If you violate these guidelines, noon may take one or more of the following actions:
Remove or hide your content
Limit your ability to use community features
Remove affected products or listings
Suspend or terminate your account
For repeated/unlawful behavior, legal action may follow

Title: noon Community Guidelines

How to Report Violations
If you spot content that you believe violates these guidelines:
Email at egypt@noon.com
Provide: link to the content or product page, screenshot(s), and explanation of why you believe it violates the rules
If you were offered payment for review content, send the evidence too.
After submission, noon will investigate and take appropriate action.

Title: noon Community Guidelines

Related Resources
Seller Review Guidelines- for seller-specific review rules
Delivery Reviews- for feedback on delivery experience

Title: noon Community Guidelines

Note:
These Community Guidelines are intended to maintain a safe, trustworthy, and useful platform for all customers. noon
reserves the right to update them and enforce them as needed.
For more details, refer to noon’s Customer Reviews Anti-Manipulation Policy to understand how reviews are monitored and
managed.

Title: Product Review Guidelines

Product Review Guidelines
Product reviews help customers learn more about an item and decide if it’s the right choice for them.
All reviews must comply with our Community Guidelines and Product Review Guidelines.
By submitting a rating or review, customers agree to our Terms of Use, Community Guidelines, and these Product Review
Guidelines, which are subject to change from time to time.

Title: Product Review Guidelines

Who Can Participate
Only customers who have ordered and received a product can submit a review.
This ensures that all reviews reflect genuine, firsthand experiences with the product.

Title: Product Review Guidelines

What Should a Review Include
Your review should focus solely on your personal experience with the product you purchased.
It should help other customers make informed purchase decisions. You may consider addressing:
What did you like about the product?
Is the product easy to use?
Does it offer good value for money?
Would you recommend it to others?
What should other customers know before buying this product?
You can also rate products from one to five stars, with five stars representing the best experience. The product’s average
rating will appear alongside its name on the site.

Title: Product Review Guidelines

What Is Not Allowed
We may remove feedback that does not relate to your experience with the product or that violates our Community
Guidelines or these review policies.
1. Community Guideline Violations
Reviews containing any of the following are not permitted:
Promotional or advertising content
Offensive, abusive, or illegal language
Hate speech or discriminatory remarks
Personal or sensitive information

Title: Product Review Guidelines

2. Seller, Order, or Shipping Feedback
Product reviews should only describe the product itself. We do not allow reviews that focus on:
Seller performance or reputation
Ordering or return experiences
Shipping, packaging, or delivery speed
Product damage or missing items
Product reviews are meant to help others understand the product, not the buying or delivery experience.
If you’d like to share feedback about sellers, packaging, or delivery, please contact Customer Support.

Title: Product Review Guidelines

3. Comments About Pricing or Availability
You can mention the product’s price only if it relates to its value (e.g., “Great quality for the price”).
However, reviews such as “Found it cheaper elsewhere” or “It’s out of stock again” are not allowed because they are not
useful to all customers.
You may express general wishes about availability (e.g., “Hope it comes in more colors”), but avoid comments about stock
status or store-level availability.

Title: Product Review Guidelines

4. Conflicts of Interest
Reviews must be unbiased and independent. You cannot create, edit, or post content about your own products or services, or
in exchange for compensation of any kind.
This includes reviews for products or services offered by:
Friends or family members
Employers or employees
Business partners or associates
Competitors
For details, please refer to our Customer Reviews Anti-Manipulation Policy.

Title: Product Review Guidelines

Consequences for Violations
Violations of these guidelines reduce trust and harm the review community.
If a user violates these rules, we may take one or more of the following actions:
Remove the violating review or related content
Restrict the user’s ability to post or edit reviews
Remove related products from listings
Suspend or terminate the user’s account
In cases involving fraud, manipulation, or violations of local law, we may take legal action, which could lead to civil or
criminal penalties.
If unusual reviewing behavior is detected, we may also limit a user’s ability to post reviews or reduce the visibility of their
reviews.

Title: Product Review Guidelines

Reporting a Review
If you find a review that seems inappropriate or violates the above guidelines, you can report it using the “Report” button
next to the review.
To learn how to report a review, follow the steps in this article: Report Button – How to Report a Review
Once we receive your report, we’ll review the matter and take appropriate action.

Title: Product Review Guidelines

Summary
We value honest and helpful feedback that improves the shopping experience for everyone.
By following these guidelines, you help keep product reviews genuine, relevant, and trustworthy for the entire community.

Title: Report Button

Report Button
The “Report” button is a safety feature that allows customers to alert the noon team about inappropriate, offensive, or
misleading reviews posted under seller profiles. This helps keep our platform safe, transparent, and respectful for all users.

Title: Report Button

Who Can Use the Report Button
Any customer with a noon account can report a review. Guests and users who are not signed in will need to log in first to
access the “Report” option.

Title: Report Button

How to Submit a Report
1.
Go to the seller’s review section on the product or seller page.
2.
Click the “Report” button next to the specific review.
3.
A pop-up window will appear with several report categories — select the one that best describes the issue.
4.
Click “Report Review.”
5.
Once submitted, a success message will appear, and a confirmation email will be sent to your registered email address.

Title: Report Button

What Happens After You Submit a Report
Once a report is submitted, noon’s moderation team reviews it carefully to determine whether the content violates the
Community Guidelines or Seller Review Guidelines.
If the review is found to be in violation, it will be removed or edited as appropriate.
If the review complies with the guidelines, it will remain visible.
Reporting a review does not affect a seller’s overall rating unless the review is confirmed to be invalid.

Title: Report Button

What Can Be Reported
Reports can be submitted for review that fall into any of the following categories:
1. Language Issues
Reviews containing:
Profanity, hate speech, or discriminatory language
Unintelligible or unsupported text
Spam, repetitive text, or irrelevant content
Promotional content about competitors or external links
2. Personal Information
Reviews that include:
Full names, phone numbers, or email addresses
Any personally identifiable information about customers or sellers
3. Harmful or Inappropriate Content
Reviews that contain:
Harassment or bullying
Hate speech or inflammatory remarks
Explicit, sexual, or illegal content
Promotion of violence or criminal activity

Title: Report Button

Outcome of a Report
noon investigates all reports and takes appropriate action based on the severity of the violation. If further clarification is
needed, noon may reach out to the reporting customer or the review author.
For more information about what qualifies as acceptable or removable content, refer to noon’s Seller Review Guidelines.

Title: Seller Review Guidelines

Seller Review Guidelines
Seller reviews on noon help customers make informed decisions and encourage sellers to maintain high service standards.
To keep reviews that are helpful, authentic, and respectful, all customer feedback must follow the guidelines below.
Purpose of Seller Reviews
Seller reviews allow customers to share experiences about their interactions with sellers, including product quality, delivery
experience, communication, and overall satisfaction.
Each review is carefully monitored to ensure it reflects genuine customer experiences and maintains platform integrity.

Title: Seller Review Guidelines

Guidelines for Writing a Review
To keep the review system fair and valuable for everyone, reviews must:
Reflect your personal experience with the seller or product purchased through noon.
Be relevant, factual, and based on actual transactions.
Focus on aspects such as delivery time, packaging, item condition, and service quality.

Title: Seller Review Guidelines

Content That Is Not Allowed
The following types of content will be removed if found in any review:
1. Inappropriate or Unsupported Language
Use of profanity or obscene language.
Reviews written in unsupported languages or unintelligible text.
Excessive symbols, emojis, or repetitive characters.
2. Promotional or Fraudulent Content
Advertising or promotional text related to other sellers or external websites.
Links to competitor platforms or any non-noon site.
Misleading, spam, or fake reviews not based on real purchases.
3. Personal or Sensitive Information
Sharing personal data such as names, contact numbers, email addresses, or social media handles.
Any attempt to identify another customer, seller, or noon employee.
4. Harmful or Unsafe Content
Harassment, hate speech, threats, or discrimination of any kind.
Sexually explicit content or imagery.
Promotion of illegal or unsafe activities.
Moderation and Review Removal
noon regularly monitors all submitted reviews. Reviews that violate these guidelines may be:
Temporarily hidden while under review.
Permanently removed from the platform.
Flagged for further action if found repeatedly violating the rules.
Review removal does not affect the seller’s rating unless the review was deemed valid before removal.

Title: Seller Review Guidelines

Reporting a Review
If you find a review that seems inappropriate or violates the above guidelines, you can report it using the “Report” button
next to the review.
You’ll need to be signed in to your noon account to submit a report.
Once reported, our moderation team will review the flagged content and take necessary action in accordance with these
guidelines.
To learn how to report a review, follow the steps in this article: Report Button – How to Report a Review

Title: Seller Review Guidelines

Note:
noon reserves the right to take down any content that violates these guidelines and to suspend users who consistently post
misleading or inappropriate reviews.
These rules exist to maintain trust and transparency between customers, sellers, and the noon platform.

Title: Updating Your Delivery Address

Updating Your Delivery Address
You can update the delivery address for an active order as long as the item has not reached a stage where the
address can no longer be changed. Address updates may affect delivery timelines depending on the new location.
Steps to update the delivery address
Before updating the address on an existing order, make sure the new address is already saved in your Address tab.
- Log in to your noon account.
- Open the Orders tab.
- Select the specific item you want to update.
- Click the item to view its Tracking Details page.
- Use the Update address button to switch your delivery to another saved address.
Important Information
- Updating the address may cause delivery delays depending on the distance between the original and new
delivery locations.
- Address changes may not be available if the item is too far along in the delivery process.

Title: Bank Partnerships Everything You Need To Know 6 3 2024 1

noon Egypt Bank Partnership Discounts Bank partnership discounts offer exclusive price benefits when you pay with eligible cards issued by participating banks. These offers vary by campaign and are subject to the eligibility criteria shown at checkout. How Bank Partnership Discounts Work Bank discounts are automatically applied at checkout when: You use an eligible card from a participating bank Your order meets the promotion’s terms, such as category restrictions or minimum purchase value No voucher code or promo code is required. If the discount does not appear, your payment method or order may not meet the offer’s eligibility criteria. Eligibility Requirements To qualify for a bank partnership discount, ensure that: The card used belongs to a participating bank The promotion is currently active Your order meets the required minimum value (if applicable) Your selected items fall under the eligible categories No other discount method has been applied Combining Bank Discounts

Title: Bank Partnerships Everything You Need To Know 6 3 2024 1

(if applicable) Your selected items fall under the eligible categories No other discount method has been applied Combining Bank Discounts with Other Offers Promo Codes and Coupons Bank discounts cannot be combined with promo codes, coupons, or voucher codes. Only one discount type can be applied per order. noon Credits If noon credits are applied to your order, bank discounts will not be available. noon credits count as a discount method. Payment Methods and Restrictions Bank discounts apply only when the eligible physical card is used directly at checkout. Payments made through Apple Pay and Other digital wallets do not qualify for bank partnership discounts, even if the underlying card is eligible. Reasons a Bank Discount May Not Apply A discount may fail to appear due to: Using a card that is not part of an active partnership The offer is expiring or is not valid during the current event

Title: Bank Partnerships Everything You Need To Know 6 3 2024 1

that is not part of an active partnership The offer is expiring or is not valid during the current event Missing the minimum spend requirement Category-based exclusions Applying a promo code, coupon, or noon credits Completing payment through Apple Pay or any digital wallet Where to Find Active Bank Offers You can view active bank promotions in the following locations: Checkout page under the Payment section Product pages, when an item or category is included in a bank offer Campaign or sale pages during major events where bank promotions are highlighted For the most accurate information, always refer to the eligibility criteria shown at checkout.

Title: Promotions What S The Deal

noon Egypt Promotions: How They Work We run different promotions throughout the year across selected products and categories. Each promotion comes with its own terms and conditions, which will always be clearly displayed on the relevant product or campaign page. What types of promotions can I expect? Our offers may include (but are not limited to): Buy X, Get Y free Percentage discounts Coupon-based savings Category-specific or brand-specific deals Cart-level offers The exact structure of each promotion will vary based on the campaign. How do I know if a product is eligible? Eligible items will be clearly marked on the product page or promotion landing page. Some promotions require a coupon code; others will apply automatically at checkout. Limits, usage caps, and exclusions will be displayed directly within the offer details. Can I combine promotions or coupon codes? Generally, no. Most promotions cannot be used together or stacked with other

Title: Promotions What S The Deal

details. Can I combine promotions or coupon codes? Generally, no. Most promotions cannot be used together or stacked with other offers, discount codes, or coupons. If combining is allowed, the terms will explicitly say so. What happens if I return an item purchased under a promotion? You will receive a partial refund, since promotional discounts are nonrefundable. If the promotion required buying multiple items (e.g., Buy X Get Y Free), your refund will reflect the adjusted value after the promotional discount. Items marked as non-returnable are not eligible for refunds or exchanges. Noon reserves the right to cancel orders that do not meet the promotion criteria. How many times can I use a promotion? Usage limits vary by campaign. Some promotions can be used once per customer; others may allow multiple uses. The limit will always be visible in the offer terms. Who can I contact if something doesn’t look

Title: Promotions What S The Deal

multiple uses. The limit will always be visible in the offer terms. Who can I contact if something doesn’t look right? If you need help with a promotion or have questions about your order: Contact our customer support team via "Need help". Always refer to the eligibility terms shown at checkout for the most accurate information.

Title: Can I use this card for other purposes?

Can I use this card for other purposes?
Yes, this credit card can be used normally outside noon

Title: How can I apply for the card?

How can I apply for the card?
To apply online for the card, click here.

Title: Is there a cap applicable on the number of 0%

Is there a cap applicable on the number of 0%
installment transactions at noon.com?
Yes, , 0% installment transactions on the card will be capped to 2 per card per calendar month (across tenures).
Cardholders who have completed 2 transactions in a calendar month will not be eligible to avail 0% plans & the option will
not be visible on noon checkout

Title: Is there a fee applicable?

Is there a fee applicable?
All fees and charges can be accessed here

Title: What are the benefits of the CIB Noon Credit Card?

What are the benefits of the CIB Noon Credit Card?
This card gives you the following benefits:
5% instant discount, capped at EGP 150 on noon.com
Receive 1.5 BONUS Points for Every 1 EGP spent on purchases outside noon.com
Equal Payment Plan (EPP) up to 15 months with 0% interest on noon.com
Priority delivery on noon express items in Cairo & Giza Waived renewal fees for customers who spend more than
EGP 60,000/year
EGP 100 cash back on your first retail transaction within 60 days of activation date
Numerous Visa offers and benefits

Title: What are the documents required to apply for the

What are the documents required to apply for the
card?
To apply for the card, you need to have a valid National ID and an HR letter. You might be required to submit
additional documents based on your customer profile.

Title: What is the CIB noon Credit Card?

What is the CIB noon Credit Card?
It is a cobranded credit card issued by Commercial International Bank (CIB) in partnership with noon and VISA.
It provides cardholders with special benefits and discounts when shopping on and outside of noon.

Title: Which tenures are live for 0% installment

Which tenures are live for 0% installment
transactions at noon.com?
6 months’ tenure is active for all days of the year. 10 & 15 months’ tenures are active for selected days, every
month

Title: Get in touch

Get in touch
Go to "Account" and click "Need Help?", (Please ensure you are logged in) Or write to us at egypt@noon.com.

Title: noon Credits and Gift Card Balance

noon Credits and Gift Card Balance
When you redeem a Gift Card, its value is instantly converted into noon Credits, which can be used to pay for
eligible items on noon website.
How It Works
Redeemed Gift Card amounts appear under Account > noon Credits.
Credits are automatically applied during checkout when eligible.
You can redeem multiple Gift Cards; all balances are added to your single noon Credits wallet.
Checking Balance and Expiry
To view your balance or expiry details:
Log in to your account
Go to Account > noon Credits
Select Credits > Pending & Expiring
Expired credits cannot be reinstated.

Title: How to Redeem a noon Gift Card

How to Redeem a noon Gift Card
You can redeem a noon Gift Card in just a few simple steps.
Log in or create an account on www.noon.com or the noon app.
Go to Account and select noon Credits.
Enter the 16-digit Gift Card Number and 4-digit PIN, then click Redeem Gift Card.
The redeemed amount will instantly appear in your noon Credits balance.
Your credits can be viewed under Account > noon Credits or during checkout.
Usage:
noon Credits from Gift Cards are automatically applied to eligible purchases at checkout.
If your order total exceeds your available credits, you can pay the remaining balance using a credit/debit
card.
You can redeem multiple Gift Cards, and all balances can be combined into one noon Credits wallet.

Title: Gift Card- Terms of Use and Restrictions Gift Card- Terms of Use and Restrictions To ensure smooth use of your Gift Card, please review the guidelines below: Terms & Restrictions Gift Cards cannot be returned, refunded, exchanged for cash, or reloaded once purchased or redeemed. Gift Cards can only be shared if unredeemed. Once redeemed, the balance becomes part of your noon Credits and cannot be transferred to another account. Gift Cards are valid only on eligible products sold on noon's website. When you return an eligible item, the refund will follow the original payment method. Any amount paid using a Gift Card will be refunded to your noon Credits balance. Cashback is not awarded on noon Gift Card purchases made using the noon–Mashreq credit card. If the Gift Card balance does not cover the full order amount, the remaining balance can be paid using any supported credit or debit card. A Gift Card can be redeemed once, and the credited amount can be used across multiple purchases until the balance is fully consumed. Gift Card(s) cannot be purchased with noon credits. Gift Cards cannot be refunded, replaced, reloaded, or converted to cash, and redeemed balances cannot be moved between accounts. Customers are responsible for safeguarding their Gift Card Number and PIN. noon is not liable for: Lost or stolen card Unauthorized redemption Fraudulent use If your Gift Card code does not work or appears redeemed, contact noon Egypt support at: egypt@noon.com Review the detailed Gift Card terms and

Number and PIN. noon is not liable for: Lost or stolen card Unauthorized redemption Fraudulent use If your Gift Card code does not work or appears redeemed, contact noon Egypt support at: egypt@noon.com Review the detailed Gift Card terms and conditions.

Title: noon Gift Card- Overview, Steps, and Validity

noon Gift Card- Overview, Steps, and Validity
A noon Gift Card is a prepaid digital card that lets you shop for a wide range of products across noon.com and the
noon app. It contains a specific value that can be redeemed to make full or partial payments for eligible orders.
You can purchase noon Gift Cards on the noon app, mobile web, or desktop website, and they will be sent to the
recipient via email.

Title: noon Gift Card- Overview, Steps, and Validity

On the App or Mobile Web
Download and log in (or create an account) on the noon app.
Search for 'Gift Cards' and all available gift cards will be visible.
Click "Add to cart or Buy now", choose the amount, and proceed to checkout.
On the Website
Log in or create an account on www.noon.com.
Go to 'Account' and select 'Gift Cards'.
Choose the gift card based on your requirement, choose the amount, and click 'proceed to buy'.
Issued gift cards are valid for one (1) year from the date of creation.

Title: noon Gift Card- Overview, Steps, and Validity

Note:
- Gift Cards cannot be purchased using noon credits or another Gift Card.
- Gift Card can be purchased with AED, SAR, and EGP currencies only

Title: noon Gift Card- Overview, Steps, and Validity

To check the expiry of credited amounts:
Go to Account > noon Credits
Select Credits
Navigate to Pending & Expiring

Title: Easy Installments- Everything You Need to Know

Easy Installments- Everything You Need to Know
Easy Installments (also known as Easy Payment Plan or EPP) lets you split eligible purchases on noon into monthly payments when you use a
supported credit card. The plan applies only to orders with a total value of 500 EGP or more.

Title: Easy Installments- Everything You Need to Know

How to Use It
1.
At checkout, select “Easy Installments” if your card is eligible.
2.
If not available automatically, you may request a plan manually through your bank by providing:
Merchant name: noon.com
Order date and amount
Order ID
Desired tenure (e.g. 6 months)
Prepaid cards and Cash-on-Delivery are not eligible for installments.

Title: Easy Installments- Everything You Need to Know

Installment Plans & Interest Rates
Installments and interest depend on your bank. For example:
Commercial International Bank (CIB)- tenures from 6 to 36 months, interest starts at 8.6 %.
ALEXBANK, National Bank of Egypt (NBE)- 6-month plans with no interest.
Always check your bank’s schedule for exact rates and tenure options before proceeding.

Title: Easy Installments- Everything You Need to Know

After Order: Tracking & Confirmation
Once you choose installments and the payment is processed, you’ll receive a confirmation email. The installment details will also appear on your first
credit-card statement.
Your bank handles repayment. It may take 3-5 business days for installment charges or changes to reflect in your bank statement.

Title: Easy Installments- Everything You Need to Know

Returns, Cancellations & Refunds
If you return an item bought via installments:
You receive a refund credited to your noon Credits account, not as cash.
The installment plan remains active. You must continue paying monthly installments under the original plan terms.
If you cancel the order before shipment, the refund still goes to your noon Credits, but the bank may still expect payment. You must contact your bank
for cancellation of your installment plan.

Title: Easy Installments- Everything You Need to Know

Additional Information
Minimum eligible order is 500 EGP.
Only supported for credit cards from partner banks, not for prepaid cards or COD orders.
Bank interest, processing fees, and credit limit eligibility vary depending on the bank. Always check the plan details before confirming payment.

Title: Managing Your Saved Cards

Managing Your Saved Cards
Saving Your Card Details
Card information saved in your account is encrypted and not visible to noon or any third party. Cards are saved
only to make checkout faster and more convenient. You can delete your saved card details at any time.

Title: Managing Your Saved Cards

Adding a New Card
Any card you use during checkout will automatically be saved to your account for future purchases.

Title: Managing Your Saved Cards

Deleting a Saved Card
Log in to your noon account.
Go to your profile and open the Payment section.
Find the card you want to remove, click the three dots next to it, and select Delete.

Title: Payment Methods on noon

Payment Methods on noon
Credit and Debit Cards
You can pay using Visa, MasterCard, or AMEX cards. Enter your card details at checkout to complete the
payment.

Title: Payment Methods on noon

Cash on Delivery (COD)
You can pay in cash when your order is delivered. The amount shown at checkout is the exact amount you
will pay, including product price and delivery fees.
Some items must be paid for using prepaid methods, and COD may be restricted if a customer has too many
open orders.
COD payments are allowed only for orders less than EGP 25,000.

Title: Payment Methods on noon

noon Wallet
Your noon Wallet is a digital balance linked to your account. Refunds may be credited to your wallet, and
you can use this balance to pay for future orders.
If your wallet balance doesn't cover the full amount, you can pay the remaining balance using Cash on
Delivery or a credit/debit card.

Title: Payment Methods on noon

Apple Pay
Apple Pay is available in selected countries on the noon app when using a supported device.
If Apple Pay is available for your country, it will appear at checkout.

Title: What is Payment On Hold?

What is Payment On Hold?
Sometime the customer's payment will be put on hold. This means that even though the payment is successful
from the customer's end, due to some security reasons it is temporarily put on hold on noon's system until
successfully verified.

Title: What should I do if my payment is on hold?

What should I do if my payment is on hold?
For security purposes, we need a scanned copy of any government-issued ID to be sent to payments@noon.com
e.g. Egyptian national ID.

Title: Payment Failures & Declines

Payment Failures & Declines
Blocked Cards
If your payment card appears to be blocked, it may be due to a restriction placed by your issuing bank. noon does
not have control over card blocks, so you’ll need to contact your bank directly to resolve the issue.

Title: Payment Failures & Declines

Payment Denied
Card payments may be denied for several reasons. Debit card payments often fail due to insufficient funds.
Credit card failures may occur if there are outstanding dues or an insufficient credit limit.
If a payment continues to fail, please contact your issuing bank for more information.

Title: Discounts & Coupon Codes

Discounts & Coupon Codes
How to Apply a Coupon Code
On the cart page, enter your coupon code in the field provided and click 'Apply'.
If the code is valid, your order summary will update to show the discount.
Click 'Secure Checkout' to continue.

Title: Discounts & Coupon Codes

Coupon Rules
A unique coupon or discount can be used only once per phone number.
You can apply only one coupon or discount per order.
Auto-discounts may appear in your cart when you meet the criteria.

Title: Discounts & Coupon Codes

Bank Discounts
Eligible bank discounts are applied automatically when the criteria are met. These appear at checkout, as they are
linked to your card details.

Title: Can I search for brands in a category?

Can I search for brands in a category?
Yes. On the left of your page you will see ‘Brand’ as a filter option. All available brands of the product you’re
looking for will be listed there.

Title: Delivery Options at noon

Delivery Options at noon
When you shop at noon, you’ll find a variety of delivery services designed to suit your needs, whether you want contactless
convenience, same-day speed, or standard deliveries. Each product page and checkout will show which options are available for that
item.

Title: Delivery Options at noon

Contactless Delivery (“Leave it at My Door”)
One of the simplest and most convenient options is contactless delivery. With this service:
Your order is placed at your doorstep rather than handed over in person.
It’s only available for prepaid orders.
There’s no extra fee, you pay the regular shipping cost. It’s available across the markets covered by noon: KSA, UAE, and Egypt.
You’ll receive a photo via WhatsApp (or the app) showing where your item was placed.
You can often combine this with other delivery enhancements (for eligible items) like same-day or consolidated shipping.

Title: Delivery Options at noon

Same-Day & Next-Day Delivery
For items labelled as “Express” (or similar), you may have access to faster services:
Some products allow you to select Same-Day Delivery or Next-Day Delivery based on your city and availability.
You’ll see banners/flags on the product page or at checkout showing whether the item qualifies.
The cost for these services depends on your location (city), the weight/size of the item, and the delivery type.

Title: Delivery Options at noon

Standard Delivery
If the item isn’t eligible for fastest delivery, standard delivery applies. This means your product will be shipped as per the estimated
delivery date shown at checkout. Your product page will show “Shipping & Delivery” details, including fees, estimated arrival, and any
conditions.

Title: Delivery Options at noon

How to Choose the Right Option
When you reach checkout, you’ll see delivery type options (if multiple are available).
Check the estimated delivery date and shipping fee before placing the order.
If you pick an express item, look for any “Same-Day” or “Next-Day” flag on the product page to verify eligibility.
Read the product page carefully: some items may have restrictions (size, weight, location) that affect delivery options.
Prepaid orders often open up more options (e.g., contactless delivery) vs cash-on‐delivery.

Title: Delivery Options at noon

Packaging
All your deliveries will arrive packaged in noon protective, branded packaging made from 100% recycled materials and sealed with
secure yellow tape. Fragile items are protected using biodegradable air packs, and the packaging can be recycled after use.

Title: Delivery Options at noon

Final Note
Every item on noon may have different delivery eligibility and fees, depending on its type, seller, weight, your location, and stock
status. For the most accurate and updated delivery information for a specific product, always check the product page.

Title: Do you have product categories? Where can I find

Do you have product categories? Where can I find
them?
You can view all our product categories by clicking on the ‘All categories’ drop down on the top left corner of the
page.

Title: How do I filter searches?

How do I filter searches?
Use the search bar on top of your web page to look for any product of your interest.
Once the search results are available, you will find several filter options on the left.

Title: How to Know if Your Order Is Accepted

How to Know if Your Order Is Accepted
In some cases, noon may need to verify your order details after you place an order.
If verification is required, you will see a message in the Orders tab notifying you that your order is under review.
A noon representative may contact you to confirm your information. Once your order is verified, you will receive
an email and app notification confirming acceptance.
You can check the real-time status of your order anytime in the 'Orders' tab.

Title: How do I search for an item?

How do I search for an item?
Simply type the name of the product that you’re looking for in the search bar.
The search bar can be found on the top of your page.

Title: noon Reviews

noon Reviews
noon allows customers to share reviews about products and seller experiences. Reviews help customers make
informed decisions and improve trust in online shopping.
Types of Reviews
Product Reviews: Shared publicly and relate only to the product purchased.
Purchase Reviews: Visible only to the seller and relate to the customer’s experience with the seller’s service.
Review Approval
noon publishes reviews that are genuine, appropriate, and relevant. Both positive and negative reviews are
accepted if they follow guidelines.
Reviews Not Approved
Reviews may be rejected if they include:
Languages other than Arabic or English
Personal customer details
Abusive, offensive, racist, or threatening language
Comments unrelated to the product
Fraudulent schemes or advertising
Employee experience
External links
Competitor references
Service complaints that belong under Purchase Reviews
Additional Rules for Product Reviews
Product reviews must focus only on the product itself. Issues related to service—like wrong or late delivery,
missing items, or damaged goods—must be submitted as purchase reviews or customer support requests.
How Reviews Are Used
noon uses reviews to calculate seller and product ratings. Recent reviews have the strongest influence.
If a purchase review violates guidelines but contains relevant information, noon may keep the rating while
removing the comment.

Title: How often do you get new products?

How often do you get new products?
We try our best to update our inventory with all the top brands and trending products.
We aim to provide you with the very latest products on noon before you find them anywhere else.

Title: How to buy and checkout on noon?

How to buy and checkout on noon?
Browse through our range of products and look for the item of your interest.
Click on the product you want to buy; this will take you to the product page.
Select your preferred quantity and click on the 'Add to Cart' button.
The product(s) you’ve selected will be added to your cart.
Choose between ‘Continue Shopping’ if you would like to add more items or ‘checkout’ with the items in your
cart.
To view your cart, click on the 'Cart Icon' on the top right corner of the page.
Click on the 'Secure Checkout' button to continue.
If you are a returning customer, please enter your Login details to proceed.
If you are a new customer, register here with your contact details.
Choose your delivery address to proceed.
Once you’ve reviewed your order, click on the “Place Order” button.
You will be asked to verify your phone number if your order was placed for the first time with that phone number.
Happy shopping!

Title: How noon Processes Refunds

How noon Processes Refunds
Card Payments
If you paid using a credit or debit card, your refund will be returned to your original payment method. Refunds
typically take 5–7 business days, depending on your bank.

Title: How noon Processes Refunds

Cash Payments
Refunds for cash-paid orders are added to your noon Credits balance.
If the refund amount is more than EGP 200, you may request to have it be transferred to your bank account.

Title: How noon Processes Refunds

Wallet Credits
Your noon Wallet is credited only through refunds.
You can use this balance to pay for future orders or combine it with COD or card payment if the wallet
amount is not enough.

Title: How noon Processes Refunds

EMI/Installment Payments
If you paid using a Credit Card EMI option, your refund will be issued to your card.
Your bank may continue to charge the monthly installment amount until you contact them to cancel or
adjust the plan.
Banks manage installment plans independently, and noon cannot cancel or modify EMI arrangements on
your behalf.

Title: Managing Your Wishlist

Managing Your Wishlist
The Wishlist feature helps you save and organize your favorite products for future purchases. You can create multiple wish
lists based on your interests, manage them easily, and choose to keep them private or share them publicly.
Add Items to Wishlist:
Click the 'heart icon' next to any product you want to save.
To view or manage your saved items, click the 'heart icon' at the top right corner of the page to open your Wishlist.
Create and Manage Wishlist:
You can create multiple wish lists to organize products by type or interest.
Click 'Create New Wishlist', enter a name, and use the toggle to set it as your 'default Wishlist' if desired.
The default Wishlist is your primary list where all new items are saved automatically.
Change Default Wishlist:
To set another Wishlist as your default:
Open the Wishlist section, click 'More', and select 'Make this default Wishlist'.
Other Wishlist Options (under “More”)
Edit – Rename your Wishlist and click Save.
Enable/Disable Public Sharing – Choose whether your Wishlist is private or visible to others through a shared link.
Empty Wishlist – Remove all items from a Wishlist in one go.
Note: Shared Wishlist are only accessible via the shared link and are not publicly searchable on noon.

Title: What should I consider before placing a new order?

What should I consider before placing a new order?
Before placing a new order, bear in mind common factors such as price, quality, warranty and any other after-sale
services provided by the seller.
We want to ensure your shopping experience is as smooth as possible with minimal errors; therefore, we request
you to consider all these factors with care.

Title: Where can I find the delivery date for an item?

Where can I find the delivery date for an item?
Before you place the order, you can find the estimated delivery date on the product description, cart and checkout
page.
After you place the order, you can find the delivery date in the Orders tab. Learn more on how to track your
order here.

Title: Why are there different prices for the same product?

Why are there different prices for the same product?
The same product can be sold by different sellers.
Sellers can list their offer against a product while keeping the price competitive.
For example: One seller might sell an item at 100 EGP, while another would sell it at 110 EGP. A list of offers can
be seen below each product.
You are free to choose whichever offer suits you best.

Title: Will I get the accessories? Will I get warranty on

Will I get the accessories? Will I get warranty on
accessories that come from renewed by noon?
All unopened and premium grade products will come with original accessories inside the box. Compatible
accessories will be offered for Max, Plus and Basic grades.
There is no warranty on accessories.

Title: How do I see product specifications and reviews?

How do I see product specifications and reviews?
Search for the product you’re interested in and open its product page.
Scroll down to the product page to see the 'Product Overview' section to view all key features, highlights,
detailed specifications, and the 'Product Reviews' section to see all buyer feedback and ratings.

Title: noon express

noon express
Express items are products stored in noon’s own warehouses, which allows for faster processing and shorter
delivery timelines. Because these items are already in our facility, they can be dispatched quickly with minimal
delays.

Title: noon express

Benefits of Express
Express provides a faster and more reliable shopping experience. Since the products are kept in noon’s warehouse,
they can be picked and packed immediately after your order is placed, resulting in quicker dispatch and more
accurate delivery estimates.

Title: noon express

How Express Processing Works
Orders containing Express items are handled directly from the warehouse where the products are stored. This
streamlined process, pick, pack, and ship from the same location, reduces handling time and ensures your delivery
moves faster through our network.

Title: Where to Find the Delivery Date for an Item

Where to Find the Delivery Date for an Item
You can view the estimated delivery date for an item before and after placing your order.
Before Placing Your Order
The estimated delivery date appears on:
The product page
Your cart
The checkout page
These estimates are based on your location, the item type, and its delivery eligibility.
After Placing Your Order
Once your order is created, you can find the delivery date in the Orders tab of your noon account.
This page shows your order timeline and updates as your shipment progresses.

Title: Why are there different prices for the same product?

Why are there different prices for the same product?
The same product may be sold by multiple sellers on the platform, and each seller sets their own price based on
factors such as stock availability, delivery time, or ongoing discounts.
You can view all available offers listed under the product and choose the one that best suits your preference for
price and delivery.

Title: How to Return an Item?

How to Return an Item?
noon allows you to return eligible items within 15 days of delivery, as long as they fall under returnable categories
and meet the standard return conditions. Once an order has been shipped and delivered, you can easily file a return
through your noon account.

Title: How to Return an Item?

How to Submit a Return Request
1. Go to 'Account'.
2. Select 'Returns', then click 'File a New Return'.
3. Choose the item(s) you want to return.
4. Select the most suitable 'return reason'.
5. Confirm your pickup location and 'submit' the request.
6. A pickup will be arranged, and your item will be inspected once received.
If you need assistance, contact our customer support team.

Title: How to Return an Item?

Return Conditions
To be eligible for a return, the item must generally be:
Unused
In its original packaging
Including all tags, accessories, and any materials provided by the manufacturer
Some categories have specific return rules, and certain items cannot be returned for hygiene, safety, or
regulatory reasons.
To view the full list of returnable and non-returnable product categories, please refer to the Terms of Sale and
Return Policy.

Title: Transferring Your noon Credits to Your Bank

Transferring Your noon Credits to Your Bank
Account
You can transfer eligible noon credits earned from returns or warranty refunds directly to your bank account.
Credits issued from gift cards or goodwill adjustments are not transferable and can only be used for purchases on
noon.

Title: Transferring Your noon Credits to Your Bank

Eligibility and Transfer Limits
Minimum transferable amount: EGP 200
Maximum per request: EGP 10,000
Request frequency: Once every 15 days
Eligible credits: Refund credits only
Not eligible: Gift voucher credits and goodwill credits
Available on: Web and Mobile Web
If the Transfer Credits button appears as Insufficient Balance, the credits in your wallet are not eligible for
withdrawal.

Title: Transferring Your noon Credits to Your Bank

How to Transfer Your Credits
1. Go to Account > noon Credits.
2. Click Withdraw to initiate the transfer.
3. Enter or select your bank account details and 'submit' the request.
4. Enter the OTP sent to your registered phone number.
5. Check your email and 'confirm' the request within 1 hour. If the email expires, the request will need to be
resubmitted.
6. The transfer amount is deducted from your wallet, and processing begins.
7. The funds are transferred to your bank within 5–7 business days, depending on bank policy.
If you already have a pending request, you’ll need to wait until it is completed before submitting another.

Title: Transferring Your noon Credits to Your Bank

Transfer Statuses Meaning
New: Request submitted; awaiting email confirmation.
Confirmed: You’ve confirmed via email; processing has started.
Processing Credit: Amount has been deducted from your wallet.
Processing: noon is working on your transfer.
Processed: Transfer approved and sent to your bank.
Rejected: Request declined due to expired confirmation, incorrect details, or bank rejection.

Title: Transferring Your noon Credits to Your Bank

Additional Information
If you enter incorrect bank details, you can cancel the request using the Cancel Request option in the
confirmation email and submit a new one.
Transfers typically take 5–7 business days, depending on your bank’s processing timeline.

Title: Refunds- Process & Timelines

Refunds- Process & Timelines
noon follows a simple refund process. Refunds are issued after your return is collected and inspected, or when a cancellation
is completed before shipment. The refund source and timeline depend on how you originally made the payment.

Title: Refunds- Process & Timelines

How Refunds Work After Returning an Item
Once your item is picked up, it goes through a quality check (QC).
If the item meets the return conditions, noon will initiate your refund based on the original payment method.
If the item does not pass QC, the return may be rejected and the product will be sent back to you.

Title: Refunds- Process & Timelines

Payment Method and Refund Source
Refunds are automatically routed as follows:
Payment Method
Refund Source
Credit/Debit Card
Back to the same card
Credit Card EMI
Same Card
Cash on Delivery/Card on Delivery
noon Credits
BNPL (e.g., ValU)
BNPL Provider
Gift Cards/noon Credits
noon Credits
Note: Once a refund has been initiated, the refund method cannot be changed.

Title: Refunds- Process & Timelines

Refund Timelines
Refund processing times vary based on your payment method:
Credit/Debit Card: 5–7 working days
Cash on Delivery: Within 24 hours to noon Credits
BNPL: Reflected within the provider’s timeline (typically within 24 hours)
noon Credits/Gift Cards: Within 24 hours
EMI: Refunded to the same card
If your refund is issued but not visible on your bank statement after the stated timeframe, please contact your bank for more
details.
Refunds for Cancellations
If you cancel your order before it ships, your refund will be processed immediately.
If the order has already shipped, you will be refunded once the item is returned to noon.

Title: Refunds- Process & Timelines

Partial Refunds
You may see a partial refund when:
Your order includes multiple items, and only some have been returned
Shipping or COD fees apply (These fees are non-refundable once an item has been delivered)

Title: Refunds- Process & Timelines

How to Check Your Refund Status
You can track your refund at any time:
Account → Orders → Select Your Order
Look for the refund status indicators such as Processing, Approved, or Declined.
If your refund status does not update after the expected timeframe, contact customer support for assistance.

Title: Refunds- Process & Timelines

Delayed Refunds
If your refund is marked as Approved, but the timeline has passed:
For card refunds: Contact your bank for an update
For wallet refunds: Check your noon Credits balance
For BNPL refunds: Contact your BNPL provider
For EMI refunds: Check your noon Credits section
If none of these resolve the issue, reach out to our customer support team, and we will help you investigate.

Title: Tracking Your Delivery & Multiple Shipments

Tracking Your Delivery & Multiple Shipments
You can track every stage of your order directly from the Orders tab in your noon account. Each item displays its
delivery date, tracking history, and available actions such as rescheduling or cancellation.
Some orders may arrive in multiple shipments depending on the seller's location, stock availability, or fulfillment
method.

Title: Tracking Your Delivery & Multiple Shipments

Reasons for multiple shipments:
Items from different sellers are dispatched separately.
Each shipment is delivered as soon as it’s ready instead of waiting for all items to be collected.

Title: Tracking Your Delivery & Multiple Shipments

Tracking your shipments:
Check delivery dates and tracking updates for each item under "Orders" in your noon account.
The estimated delivery date is also displayed in the Delivery section on the product page (below the “Add to
Cart” button).
You will receive order updates through email and app notifications.

Title: Tracking Your Delivery & Multiple Shipments

Fees: Shipping and Cash on Delivery fees are applied only once per order, not per shipment.

Title: Tracking Your Delivery & Multiple Shipments

Tracking Statuses Meaning:
Processing: Your order is under review; we’ll contact you if details need verification.
Confirmed: Your order is approved and being prepared for dispatch.
Packed: Your items are packed and ready to be handed over for delivery.
Dispatched: The shipment is with our delivery partner.
If delivered by a third-party carrier, you’ll see a 'Track Shipment link'.
If delivered by noon express, updates appear directly in the Orders tab.
Out for Delivery: Your shipment is on its way. For certain orders, a delivery code may be required.
Pending Pick-up: For locker or pickup-point deliveries, your shipment is ready for collection and must be
picked up within the allowed window.
Refer 'Orders' tab to view Live tracking, Delivery date, Delivery partner information, reschedule or cancellation
options (where applicable)

Title: Delivery Options at noon

Delivery Options at noon
noon offers a variety of delivery services designed to match your speed, convenience, and budget needs. Delivery
availability depends on the item, seller, and your location. You’ll always see the available delivery options on the
product page and at checkout.

Title: Delivery Options at noon

Express: noon Express items are stocked, packed, and shipped directly by noon.
This ensures faster and more reliable delivery.
You can spot these items easily by looking for the noon Express label on the product page.

Title: Delivery Options at noon

Same-day & Next-day Delivery: These options are available only for eligible Express items and select cities.
The available option (same-day or next-day) will appear at checkout.
Delivery fees may vary based on the service and your location.
These services ensure your order reaches you within hours or by the next day.
Always refer to the Product and checkout page for delivery options

Title: How can I cancel my order?

How can I cancel my order?
You can cancel an order, individual items, or a shipment directly from the Tracking Details page in the 'Orders'
tab. The available cancellation option depends on the current delivery status.

Title: How can I cancel my order?

Before Your Order Is Packed
If the delivery status is Processing or Confirmed, use the Cancel Items button.
The applicable refund is issued immediately.

Title: How can I cancel my order?

After Your Order Is Packed
If the delivery status is Packed, Dispatched, Out for Delivery, or Pending Pick-up, use the 'Cancel
Shipment' button.
Refunds for these cancellations are processed within 24–72 hours, and the exact timeline is shown on the
'Tracking Details' page.

Title: How can I cancel my order?

Important
Always cancel through the 'Orders' tab to ensure the refund is processed as quickly as possible.

Title: I didn’t receive my order confirmation email. What

I didn’t receive my order confirmation email. What
should I do?
If you didn’t get the order confirmation email, first check the inbox for the email address you used to place the
order and your Spam/Junk folder. If you still can’t find it, open Account → Orders to confirm your order details
and status.

Title: noon Lockers

noon Lockers
noon lockers let you collect your shipments from secure, self-service locker locations using a unique PIN or QR
code. This option is available only for eligible noon shipments and allows quick, convenient pickup without
waiting for home delivery.

Title: noon Lockers

How to Use noon Lockers during checkout:
Select 'Add a New Address'.
Choose 'noon Locker' from the available locations near you.
Review the locker’s location, timings, and details.
Save the locker as an address and proceed with your order as usual.
You will receive notifications and an email once your shipment is placed in the locker.

Title: noon Lockers

Why a Locker Option May Not Appear
No locker is available near your location.
The item is oversized (e.g., large appliances, TVs, refrigerators).
The item is fragile or temperature-sensitive (e.g., chocolates, frozen or chilled items).
Your order contains more than four items.
If a shipment cannot fit inside the locker after dispatch, our team will deliver it to your home address instead.

Title: noon Lockers

Tracking Your Locker Delivery
Once your shipment reaches the locker, the Orders tab will display:
The locker code or PIN
The locker’s location link
The pickup window and countdown timer
You will also receive email updates and app notifications, including a reminder when only 48 hours remain
to collect your item.

Title: noon Lockers

Picking Up Your Shipment
Visit the locker location within the 5-day pickup window.
Enter your unique PIN on the locker screen (available in SMS, email, and the Orders tab).
Use your QR code from My Account > QR Code in the noon app.
The locker will open automatically, and your pickup is complete.
Pickup Window & Refunds
Shipments remain in the locker for 5 days.
If not collected, the package is returned to noon and refunded based on your payment method:
Wallet credits → refunded to wallet within 24 hours
Card payments (if refund preference is set to card) → refunded to card within 48 hours (bank may take
up to 7 business days to reflect the amount)
Mixed payments → each portion refunded to its source

Title: noon Pickup Points

noon Pickup Points
noon Pickup Points allow you to collect your order from one of noon’s partnered stores instead of receiving it at
your home or office. This option appears at checkout when eligible for your order and location.

Title: noon Pickup Points

How to Use a Pickup Point
At checkout, select Add a New Address.
Choose Locker or Pickup Point to view all available locations near you.
Select the most convenient Pickup Point and save it to your address book.
Place your order as usual.
You’ll receive a confirmation email and SMS once the order is ready for collection.

Title: noon Pickup Points

Collecting Your Shipment
To pick up your order:
Open My Account on the noon app and tap QR Code.
Show the dynamic QR code to the store representative.
They will scan it and hand over your package.
The QR code must be shown through the app as it refreshes dynamically.

Title: noon Pickup Points

Pickup Window
You have 5 days to collect your shipment once it arrives at the Pickup Point.
If the package is not collected within this timeframe, it will be returned and you will receive a full refund.

Title: noon Pickup Points

Order Limits for Pickup Points
Maximum order value: EGP 2,000
Maximum number of items: 5
Cash on Delivery (COD) is not available for Pickup Point orders.

Title: noon Pickup Points

Why the Pickup Point May Not Appear
The option may not be available if:
No Pickup Points exist near your location
The items are oversized (e.g., appliances, TVs, refrigerators)
Items are temperature-sensitive or easily damaged (e.g., chocolates, frozen foods)
Your order contains more than 5 items

Title: noon Pickup Points

Important Notes
Once you select a Pickup Point as your delivery address, it cannot be changed to a home or office address.
Pickup Points do not support returns. Submit a return request through the app or website and use a standard
delivery address for pickup.
Active Pickup Points can be viewed when adding a new address. Use the “Show me noon lockers and
Pickup Points” toggle to display all available locations on the map.

Title: Delivery Delays and How to Resolve Them

Delivery Delays and How to Resolve Them
If your order has not arrived by the expected delivery date, check the "Orders' tab for real-time updates. Delivery
delays can occur for several reasons, and the Orders tab will show the exact action needed to complete the
delivery.
Delivery Issues and How to Fix Them
Your address or PIN needs correction. Update it within 48 hours or cancel the shipment from the 'Orders'
tab.
Your phone number may be incorrect or unreachable. Update it through 'Update Address'.
If the agent can’t contact you, you can reschedule or cancel directly from the 'Orders' tab.
Use 'Cancel Shipment' in the 'Orders' tab to trigger any applicable refund.
After three failed delivery attempts, the shipment is returned. Refund can be triggered from Cancel
Shipment.
We will notify you via email or phone if action is required. Ensuring your address and phone number are accurate
helps prevent delays.
